deviations.fp32_embed_grad_accum: embedding gradients accumulate across micro-batches in an fp32 master buffer, cast back to bf16 once per step (record: bf16 throughout, one backward per step). NOT RECORD-FAITHFUL: diagnostic probe for docs/nanogpt-port.md §6.1.
deviations.grad_accumulation: 1 device(s) x 8 micro-batches = 8 record chunks per optimizer step; tokens/step 393216 (record 393216)
deviations.head_chunk_rows: lm_head + soft-cap + cross-entropy computed over row chunks of 8192 (train chunks gradient-checkpointed; record: one full-width head GEMM). Same math up to fp32 summation order. NOT RECORD-FAITHFUL: 32 GB-GPU memory path (model.py PORT CHANGE P5).
deviations.max_steps: truncated at 600 steps — smoke run, not a record run
deviations.tempo_probe: program-#8 passive tempo probe on (subset 2); measurement-only, update path untouched (optim.py PORT CHANGE P6)
